description_long: This is a classic upholstered chaise with a high, ornately contoured wooden backrest and matching wooden frame. The upholstery is a solid, muted beige fabric that covers both the seat and backrest, giving it a refined and understated appearance. The backrest features a gently undulating silhouette with carved wood trim, adding a touch of elegance and vintage charm. Both armrests are present and curve outward, following the lines of the backrest, and are also trimmed with wood. The seat consists of two large, flat cushions that are seamlessly integrated into the frame. The legs are short, cabriole-style, and made of polished wood, providing sturdy support and a traditional aesthetic.
description: A vintage-style chaise with beige upholstery, ornate wooden trim, and cabriole legs. It features a high, contoured backrest and two large seat cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full contoured backrest, both armrests, and the two large seat cushions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the outward curve of the armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden trim and the undulating silhouette of the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the matching armrest and the chaise's overall profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high and features a gently undulating, contoured silhouette with ornate wooden trim along the top edge. It is solid and unsegmented, providing continuous support across its width.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, curving outward and trimmed with wood to match the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, cabriole-style, made of polished wood, and feature subtle decorative curves typical of traditional furniture.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid beige fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, flat seat cushions placed side by side, seamlessly integrated into the frame, with no loose or layered cushions visible.
